summary: RBAC Permission System E2E Testing - Iteration 54. Verified 3-level permission system (none/read/write) for all 5 roles. Backend API tests (32/32 passing) and Frontend UI tests for admin vs general_manager role visibility.

minor.issue:
Console shows hydration warning '
cannot be descendant of

' in ZoneEmployeesTab - minor React DOM nesting issue

rbac_permission_format.details: Permissions returned as dict {perm: 'read'|'write'} not array

general_manager_permissions.details: All permissions set to 'read' - no write access to create/delete/approve sessions

department_manager_permissions.details: Has write access to create_session, approve_session, delete_session, start_prayer_round, distribute_employees, enter_density

shift_supervisor_permissions.details: Mixed permissions - write for start_prayer_round, distribute_employees, enter_density but NO create/delete session

field_staff_permissions.details: Minimal permissions - only enter_density:write, send_alert:write, view_coverage_map:read

ui_admin_visibility.details: Admin sees all buttons: جولة جديدة, إدخال متعدد, إنهاء الجولة, توزيع تلقائي, تعيين سريع, prayer start buttons

ui_general_manager_visibility.details: General Manager sees NO action buttons - read-only view. Calendar shows 'view tour' not 'create tour' message

permission_update_api.details: PUT /api/admin/role-permissions/{role} correctly updates and persists permission changes

critical_code_review_comments:
Minor: ZoneEmployeesTab.jsx has HTML nesting issue (
inside

) causing React hydration warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC permission system fully tested. All 5 roles verified: system_admin (all write), general_manager (all read), department_manager (most write), shift_supervisor (mixed), field_staff (minimal), admin_staff (reports only). Frontend correctly hides/shows buttons based on canWrite() checks. Backend /auth/my-permissions returns correct {perm: 'read'|'write'} format.
features_verified: Login with each role shows correct role badge in header
Daily sessions page: 'جولة جديدة' button hidden for read-only roles
Daily sessions page: 'إنهاء الجولة' button hidden for roles without approve_session:write
Daily sessions page: prayer start/skip buttons hidden for roles without start_prayer_round:write
Employees tab: quick-assign and auto-distribute buttons hidden for roles without distribute_employees:write
/api/auth/my-permissions returns correct format {perm: 'read'|'write'} for each role
Permission changes via /api/admin/role-permissions/{role} are applied correctly
